/* Print styles */
@media print {
  .category-bar, .nav-links, .theme-toggle, .power-btn, .variant-tabs, .threat-btn, .sorting-bar, .print-char-btn, .print-party-btn {
    display: none !important;
  }
  .print-character { page-break-after: always; }
  .print-character:last-child { page-break-after: auto; }

<div class="registry">
  <div class="sidebar">
	  <div class="sidebar-title">Adventurer Registry</div>
	  <div id="list" class="entry-list"></div>

<script>
// Registry core with Civilian and Faction support
window.REGISTRY = (function() {
  let allAdventurers = [];
  let parties = [];
  let civilians = [];
  let factions = [];
  let currentView = 'categories';
  let currentCategory = null;
  let currentParty = null;
  let currentAdventurer = null;
  let currentCivilian = null;
  let currentFaction = null;

  const CAPS = { Silver: 350, Gold: 550, Diamond: 800 };
  function fmt(n) { return n >= 1000 ? n.toLocaleString() : String(n); }
  function pct(v, cap) { return Math.min(100, Math.round(v / cap * 100)); }

  // ========================
  // PRINT FUNCTIONS
  // ========================
  
  function generateCharacterHTML(character) {
    const cap = CAPS[character.stats?.rank] || 550;
    return `
      <div class="print-character" style="page-break-after: always; margin-bottom: 40px;">
        <div style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
          <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;">${character.name}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #666;">${character.title || 'No Title'} · ${character.rankLabel || 'N/A'} · ${character.role || character.sub || 'Civilian'}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px;">${character.basic?.Affiliation || character.affiliation || 'Adventurer\'s Guild'}</div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
          <div style="background: #f5f5f5; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px;">
            <strong>Basic Info</strong><br>
            Age: ${character.basic?.Age || 'Unknown'}<br>
            Gender: ${character.basic?.Gender || 'Unknown'}<br>
            Height: ${character.basic?.Height || 'Unknown'}<br>
            Race: ${character.basic?.Race || 'Unknown'}
          </div>
          <div style="background: #f5f5f5; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px;">
            <strong>Stats</strong><br>
            ${character.stats ? Object.entries(character.stats.values).map(([k, v]) => `<span style="display: inline-block; width: 45%;">${k}: ${v}</span>`).join('') : 'Civilian / Faction - No combat stats'}
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
          <strong>Background</strong>
          <p style="margin-top: 5px; line-height: 1.5;">${character.background || character.desc || 'No background recorded.'}</p>
        </div>
        
        ${character.personality ? `
        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
          <strong>Personality</strong>
          <p style="margin-top: 5px; line-height: 1.5;">${character.personality}</p>
        </div>
        ` : ''}
        
        ${character.equipment ? `
        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
          <strong>Equipment / Distinctive Items</strong>
          ${character.equipment.map(e => `<div style="margin-top: 5px;"><strong>${e.name}</strong> — ${e.note}</div>`).join('')}
        </div>
        ` : ''}
        
        ${character.strengths ? `
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px;">
          <div>
            <strong>Strengths</strong>
            <ul style="margin-top: 5px;">${character.strengths.map(s => `<li>${s}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
          </div>
          <div>
            <strong>Weaknesses</strong>
            <ul style="margin-top: 5px;">${character.weaknesses.map(w => `<li>${w}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        ` : ''}
        
        ${character.feats ? `
        <div style="margin-top: 15px;">
          <strong>Notable Achievements</strong>
          <ul>${character.feats.map(f => `<li>${f}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
        </div>
        ` : ''}
        
        <div style="margin-top: 15px; font-size: 12px; color: #888; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; padding-top: 10px;">
          Printed from Adventurer Registry | ${new Date().toLocaleString()}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }
  
  function printAllCharacters() {
    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
    printWindow.document.write(`
      <html>
      <head>
        <title>Adventurer Registry - Complete Printout</title>
        <style>
          body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 20px; background: white; }
          .print-character { margin-bottom: 40px; page-break-after: always; }
          .print-character:last-child { page-break-after: auto; }
          h1 { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; }
          .section-title { font-size: 20px; margin: 30px 0 15px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #333; }
          @media print {
            body { padding: 0; }
            .print-character { page-break-after: always; }
          }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <h1>Adventurer Registry</h1>
        <p>Complete printout - ${new Date().toLocaleString()}</p>
    `);
    
    if (parties.length > 0) {
      printWindow.document.write(`<div class="section-title">?? Adventuring Parties</div>`);
      for (const party of parties) {
        printWindow.document.write(`<h2 style="margin-top: 20px;">${party.name}</h2>`);
        for (const member of party.members) {
          printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(member));
        }
      }
    }
    
    const soloMembers = allAdventurers.filter(a => a.category === 'Solo');
    if (soloMembers.length > 0) {
      printWindow.document.write(`<div class="section-title">?? Solo Adventurers</div>`);
      for (const solo of soloMembers) {
        printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(solo));
      }
    }
    
    const unregisteredMembers = allAdventurers.filter(a => a.category === 'Unregistered');
    if (unregisteredMembers.length > 0) {
      printWindow.document.write(`<div class="section-title">? Notable Unregistered</div>`);
      for (const unreg of unregisteredMembers) {
        printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(unreg));
      }
    }
    
    if (civilians.length > 0) {
      printWindow.document.write(`<div class="section-title">?? Notable Civilians</div>`);
      for (const civilian of civilians) {
        printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(civilian));
      }
    }
    
    if (factions.length > 0) {
      printWindow.document.write(`<div class="section-title">??? Factions & Organizations</div>`);
      for (const faction of factions) {
        printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(faction));
      }
    }
    
    printWindow.document.write('</body></html>');
    printWindow.document.close();
    printWindow.print();
  }
  
  function printCurrentCharacter(character) {
    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
    printWindow.document.write(`
      <html>
      <head>
        <title>${character.name} - Character Sheet</title>
        <style>
          body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 20px; background: white; }
          @media print {
            body { padding: 0; }
          }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        ${generateCharacterHTML(character)}
      </body>
      </html>
    `);
    printWindow.document.close();
    printWindow.print();
  }
  
  function printPartyMembers(party) {
    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
    printWindow.document.write(`
      <html>
      <head>
        <title>${party.name} - Party Roster</title>
        <style>
          body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 20px; background: white; }
          .print-character { margin-bottom: 40px; page-break-after: always; }
          .print-character:last-child { page-break-after: auto; }
          h1 { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; }
          @media print {
            body { padding: 0; }
            .print-character { page-break-after: always; }
          }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <h1>${party.name}</h1>
        <p>Printed: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}</p>
    `);
    for (const member of party.members) {
      printWindow.document.write(generateCharacterHTML(member));
    }
    printWindow.document.write('</body></html>');
    printWindow.document.close();
    printWindow.print();
  }

  function getBadgeClass(category) {
    switch(category) {
      case 'Parties': return 'b-party';
      case 'Solo': return 'b-solo';
      case 'Unregistered': return 'b-independent';
      case 'Civilian': return 'b-civilian';
      case 'Faction': return 'b-faction';
      default: return 'b-solo';
    }
  }

  function getBadgeText(category) {
    switch(category) {
      case 'Parties': return 'Party Member';
      case 'Solo': return 'Solo Adventurer';
      case 'Unregistered': return 'Unregistered';
      case 'Civilian': return 'Civilian';
      case 'Faction': return 'Organization';
      default: return 'Adventurer';
    }
  }

  function renderCivilianDetail(civilian) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('detail');
    const basicHTML = `<div class="info-grid">
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Age</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.basic?.Age || 'Unknown'}</div></div>
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Gender</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.basic?.Gender || 'Unknown'}</div></div>
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Height</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.basic?.Height || 'Unknown'}</div></div>
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Race</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.basic?.Race || 'Unknown'}</div></div>
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Occupation</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.role || civilian.sub || 'Civilian'}</div></div>
      <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Affiliation</div><div class="info-val">${civilian.basic?.Affiliation || civilian.affiliation || 'None'}</div></div>
    </div>`;
    
    const equipHTML = (civilian.equipment || []).map(e => `<div class="equip-item"><span class="equip-icon">${e.icon}</span><div><div class="equip-name">${e.name}</div><div class="equip-note">${e.note}</div></div></div>`).join('');
    const strHTML = (civilian.strengths || []).map(s => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-green"></span>${s}</div>`).join('');
    const wkHTML = (civilian.weaknesses || []).map(w => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-red"></span>${w}</div>`).join('');
    const featHTML = (civilian.feats || []).map(f => `<div class="feat-item"><span class="feat-star">?</span>${f}</div>`).join('');
    const miscHTML = `<div class="misc-grid">${Object.entries(civilian.misc || {}).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="misc-item"><div class="misc-label">${k}</div><div class="misc-val">${v}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
    
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="dossier">
        <div class="dos-top" id="dosTop">
          <div class="dos-avatar" style="background:${civilian.avBg};color:${civilian.avColor};border-color:${civilian.accentColor}">${civilian.avText}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="dos-name">${civilian.name}</div>
            <div class="dos-title">${civilian.title || 'Notable Civilian'}</div>
            <div class="dos-badges">
              <span class="badge b-civilian">Civilian</span>
              <span class="badge b-role">${civilian.role || civilian.sub || 'Citizen'}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Basic Information</div>${basicHTML}</div>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Appearance</div><div class="prose"><p>${civilian.appearance}</p></div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Personality</div><div class="prose"><p>${civilian.personality}</p></div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Background</div><div class="prose"><p>${civilian.background}</p></div></div>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        ${equipHTML ? `<div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Notable Possessions</div>${equipHTML}</div>` : ''}
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Profile</div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Strengths / Reputation</div>${strHTML}</div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Weaknesses / Limitations</div>${wkHTML}</div>
          ${featHTML ? `<div><div class="ab-category">Notable Achievements</div>${featHTML}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Public Perception</div><div class="rep-box">${civilian.reputation}</div>${civilian.nickname ? `<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;color:#666"><strong>Known As:</strong> ${civilian.nickname}</div>` : ''}</div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Miscellaneous</div>${miscHTML}</div>
      </div>
    `;
    
    const dosTop = document.getElementById('dosTop');
    if (dosTop && !document.querySelector('.print-char-btn')) {
      const printBtn = document.createElement('button');
      printBtn.className = 'power-btn print-char-btn';
      printBtn.textContent = '??? Print Civilian Record';
      printBtn.style.background = '#4a4a6a';
      printBtn.onclick = () => printCurrentCharacter(civilian);
      dosTop.appendChild(printBtn);
    }
  }

    function renderFactionDetail(faction) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('detail');
    
    // Build members list with clickable links if members have IDs
    let membersHTML = '';
    if (faction.members && faction.members.length > 0) {
      const memberItems = faction.members.map(m => {
        // Check if this member exists in our data (has an ID that matches a registered character)
        const isClickable = m.id && (
          allAdventurers.some(a => a.id === m.id) ||
          parties.some(p => p.id === m.id) ||
          civilians.some(c => c.id === m.id) ||
          factions.some(f => f.id === m.id)
        );
        
        if (isClickable) {
          // Create clickable member entry
          return `
            <div class="entry" style="margin-bottom: 6px; border-left-color: ${m.accentColor || '#888'}; cursor: pointer;" data-member-id="${m.id}">
              <div class="av" style="background:${m.avBg || '#ddd'}; color:${m.avColor || '#333'}; width: 28px; height: 28px; font-size: 11px;">${m.avText || m.name.charAt(0)}</div>
              <div>
                <div class="ename">${m.name}</div>
                <div class="erank">${m.role} — Click to view full profile</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
        } else {
          // Non-clickable member (no matching entry)
          return `
            <div class="info-item" style="margin-bottom: 6px;">
              <div class="info-label">${m.name}</div>
              <div class="info-val">${m.role} — ${m.note || ''}</div>
            </div>
          `;
        }
      }).join('');
      
      membersHTML = `
        <div class="section">
          <div class="sec-title">Key Members (${faction.members.length})</div>
          <div id="factionMembersList">
            ${memberItems}
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }
    
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="dossier">
        <div class="dos-top">
          <div class="dos-avatar" style="background:${faction.avBg || '#ececec'};color:${faction.avColor || '#555'}">${faction.avText || '???'}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="dos-name">${faction.name}</div>
            <div class="dos-title">${faction.sub || 'Organization'}</div>
            <div class="dos-badges"><span class="badge b-faction">Faction</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Overview</div><div class="prose"><p>${faction.desc}</p></div></div>
        ${membersHTML}
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Significance</div><div class="rep-box">${faction.importance || 'No additional notes.'}</div></div>
        ${faction.notes ? `<div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Additional Notes</div><div class="prose"><p>${faction.notes}</p></div></div>` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
    
    // Attach click handlers to clickable member entries
    const memberEntries = panel.querySelectorAll('#factionMembersList .entry');
    memberEntries.forEach(entry => {
      entry.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const memberId = entry.dataset.memberId;
        // Find the member in any of our collections
        let found = allAdventurers.find(a => a.id === memberId);
        if (found) {
          currentAdventurer = found;
          currentParty = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          renderAdventurerDetail(found);
          return;
        }
        found = parties.find(p => p.id === memberId);
        if (found) {
          currentParty = found;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          renderPartyDetail(found);
          return;
        }
        found = civilians.find(c => c.id === memberId);
        if (found) {
          currentCivilian = found;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentParty = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          renderCivilianDetail(found);
          return;
        }
        found = factions.find(f => f.id === memberId);
        if (found) {
          currentFaction = found;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentParty = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          renderFactionDetail(found);
          return;
        }
      });
    });
  }

  // Existing render functions for adventurers and parties (keep as before)
  function getAffilClassAndText(category) {
    if (category === 'Parties') return { cls: 'b-party', text: 'Party Member' };
    if (category === 'Solo') return { cls: 'b-solo', text: 'Solo Adventurer' };
    if (category === 'Unregistered') return { cls: 'b-independent', text: 'Unregistered' };
    return { cls: 'b-solo', text: 'Adventurer' };
  }

  function renderAdventurerDetail(adv) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('detail');
    const cap = CAPS[adv.stats?.rank] || 550;
    const basicHTML = `<div class="info-grid">${Object.entries(adv.basic).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">${k}</div><div class="info-val">${v}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
    const statsHTML = `<div class="rank-scale">Stat ceiling for ${adv.stats.rank} rank: ${fmt(cap)}</div><div class="stats-grid2">${Object.entries(adv.stats.values).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="srow2"><span class="slbl2">${k}</span><div class="bline2"><div class="btrack2"><div class="bfill2" style="width:${pct(v, cap)}%;background:${adv.stats.bars?.[k] || '#999'}"></div></div><span class="sval2">${fmt(v)}</span></div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
    const equipHTML = (adv.equipment || []).map(e => `<div class="equip-item"><span class="equip-icon">${e.icon}</span><div><div class="equip-name">${e.name}</div><div class="equip-note">${e.note}</div></div></div>`).join('');
    const abHTML = Object.entries(adv.abilities || {}).map(([cat, list]) => {
      let pillClass = 'pill-pass';
      if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('heal')) pillClass = 'pill-heal';
      else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('buff')) pillClass = 'pill-buff';
      else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('off') || cat.toLowerCase().includes('attack')) pillClass = 'pill-off';
      else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('def')) pillClass = 'pill-def';
      return `<div class="ability-block"><div class="ab-category">${cat}</div><div class="pills">${list.map(ab => `<span class="pill ${pillClass}">${ab}</span>`).join('')}</div></div>`;
    }).join('');
    const sigHTML = adv.signature ? `<div class="sig-box"><div class="sig-name">${adv.signature.name}</div><div class="sig-desc">${adv.signature.desc}</div></div>` : '';
    const strHTML = (adv.strengths || []).map(s => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-green"></span>${s}</div>`).join('');
    const wkHTML = (adv.weaknesses || []).map(w => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-red"></span>${w}</div>`).join('');
    const bestHTML = (adv.bestAgainst || []).map(b => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-blue"></span>${b}</div>`).join('');
    const struggleHTML = (adv.struggleAgainst || []).map(b => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-orange"></span>${b}</div>`).join('');
    const featHTML = (adv.feats || []).map(f => `<div class="feat-item"><span class="feat-star">?</span>${f}</div>`).join('');
    const teamHTML = (adv.teammates && adv.teammates.length) ? adv.teammates.map(t => `<div class="team-item"><div class="team-av" style="background:${t.avBg};color:${t.avColor}">${t.avText}</div><div><div class="team-name">${t.name} <span style="font-size:10px;color:#aaa;font-weight:400">— ${t.role}</span></div><div class="team-rel">${t.rel}</div></div></div>`).join('') : '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#aaa;font-style:italic">No registered party affiliations.</div>';
    const teamRoleHTML = adv.teamRole ? `<div style="margin-top:8px"><div class="ab-category">Role in Team</div><div class="prose" style="margin-top:4px"><p>${adv.teamRole}</p></div></div>` : '';
    const miscHTML = `<div class="misc-grid">${Object.entries(adv.misc || {}).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="misc-item"><div class="misc-label">${k}</div><div class="misc-val">${v}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
    let rankClass = 'b-silver';
    if (adv.rankLabel === 'Gold') rankClass = 'b-gold';
    else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Diamond') rankClass = 'b-diamond';
    else if (adv.rankLabel.includes('Diamond')) rankClass = 'b-diamond';
    else if (adv.rankLabel === '~Diamond') rankClass = 'b-approx';
    const affil = getAffilClassAndText(adv.category);
    
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="dossier">
        <div class="dos-top" id="dosTop">
          <div class="dos-avatar" style="background:${adv.avBg};color:${adv.avColor};border-color:${adv.accentColor}">${adv.avText}</div>
          <div><div class="dos-name">${adv.name}</div><div class="dos-title">${adv.title}</div><div class="dos-badges"><span class="badge ${rankClass}">${adv.rankLabel} Rank</span><span class="badge b-role">${adv.basic.Role || adv.role}</span><span class="badge ${affil.cls}">${affil.text}</span></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Basic Information</div>${basicHTML}</div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Statistics</div>${statsHTML}</div>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Appearance</div><div class="prose"><p>${adv.appearance}</p></div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Personality</div><div class="prose"><p>${adv.personality}</p></div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Background</div><div class="prose"><p>${adv.background}</p></div></div>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Equipment</div>${equipHTML || '<p>None noted.</p>'}</div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Abilities & Magic</div>${abHTML || '<p>None.</p>'}</div>
        ${sigHTML ? `<div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Signature Ability</div>${sigHTML}</div>` : ''}
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Combat Profile</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Strengths</div>${strHTML}</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Weaknesses</div>${wkHTML}</div><div><div class="ab-category">Preferred Strategy</div><div class="prose" style="margin-top:4px"><p>${adv.strategy}</p></div></div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Field Performance</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Best Against</div>${bestHTML}</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Struggles Against</div>${struggleHTML}</div><div><div class="ab-category">Notable Feats</div>${featHTML}</div></div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Team Dynamics</div>${teamHTML}${teamRoleHTML}</div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Public Perception</div><div class="rep-box">${adv.reputation}</div>${adv.nickname ? `<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;color:#666"><strong>Nickname/Title:</strong> ${adv.nickname}</div>` : ''}</div>
        <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Miscellaneous</div>${miscHTML}</div>
      </div>
    `;
    
    const dosTop = document.getElementById('dosTop');
    if (dosTop && !document.querySelector('.print-char-btn')) {
      const printBtn = document.createElement('button');
      printBtn.className = 'power-btn print-char-btn';
      printBtn.textContent = '??? Print Character Sheet';
      printBtn.style.background = '#4a4a6a';
      printBtn.onclick = () => printCurrentCharacter(adv);
      dosTop.appendChild(printBtn);
    }
  }

  function renderPartyDetail(party) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('detail');
    const members = party.members;
    if (!members || members.length === 0) {
      panel.innerHTML = '<div class="placeholder">No members in this party.</div>';
      return;
    }

    let tabsHTML = `<div class="variant-tabs" id="partyTabs">`;
    members.forEach((member, idx) => {
      tabsHTML += `<div class="vtab ${idx === 0 ? 'active' : ''}" data-id="${member.id}">${member.name}</div>`;
    });
    tabsHTML += `</div>`;
    panel.innerHTML = tabsHTML + `<div id="partyMemberContent"></div>`;

    function loadMember(memberId) {
      const member = members.find(m => m.id === memberId);
      if (member) {
        const cap = CAPS[member.stats?.rank] || 550;
        const basicHTML = `<div class="info-grid">${Object.entries(member.basic).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">${k}</div><div class="info-val">${v}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        const statsHTML = `<div class="rank-scale">Stat ceiling for ${member.stats.rank} rank: ${fmt(cap)}</div><div class="stats-grid2">${Object.entries(member.stats.values).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="srow2"><span class="slbl2">${k}</span><div class="bline2"><div class="btrack2"><div class="bfill2" style="width:${pct(v, cap)}%;background:${member.stats.bars?.[k] || '#999'}"></div></div><span class="sval2">${fmt(v)}</span></div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        const equipHTML = (member.equipment || []).map(e => `<div class="equip-item"><span class="equip-icon">${e.icon}</span><div><div class="equip-name">${e.name}</div><div class="equip-note">${e.note}</div></div></div>`).join('');
        const abHTML = Object.entries(member.abilities || {}).map(([cat, list]) => {
          let pillClass = 'pill-pass';
          if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('heal')) pillClass = 'pill-heal';
          else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('buff')) pillClass = 'pill-buff';
          else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('off') || cat.toLowerCase().includes('attack')) pillClass = 'pill-off';
          else if (cat.toLowerCase().includes('def')) pillClass = 'pill-def';
          return `<div class="ability-block"><div class="ab-category">${cat}</div><div class="pills">${list.map(ab => `<span class="pill ${pillClass}">${ab}</span>`).join('')}</div></div>`;
        }).join('');
        const sigHTML = member.signature ? `<div class="sig-box"><div class="sig-name">${member.signature.name}</div><div class="sig-desc">${member.signature.desc}</div></div>` : '';
        const strHTML = (member.strengths || []).map(s => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-green"></span>${s}</div>`).join('');
        const wkHTML = (member.weaknesses || []).map(w => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-red"></span>${w}</div>`).join('');
        const bestHTML = (member.bestAgainst || []).map(b => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-blue"></span>${b}</div>`).join('');
        const struggleHTML = (member.struggleAgainst || []).map(b => `<div class="str-row"><span class="str-dot dot-orange"></span>${b}</div>`).join('');
        const featHTML = (member.feats || []).map(f => `<div class="feat-item"><span class="feat-star">?</span>${f}</div>`).join('');
        const teamHTML = (member.teammates && member.teammates.length) ? member.teammates.map(t => `<div class="team-item"><div class="team-av" style="background:${t.avBg};color:${t.avColor}">${t.avText}</div><div><div class="team-name">${t.name} <span style="font-size:10px;color:#aaa;font-weight:400">— ${t.role}</span></div><div class="team-rel">${t.rel}</div></div></div>`).join('') : '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#aaa;font-style:italic">No registered party affiliations.</div>';
        const teamRoleHTML = member.teamRole ? `<div style="margin-top:8px"><div class="ab-category">Role in Team</div><div class="prose" style="margin-top:4px"><p>${member.teamRole}</p></div></div>` : '';
        const miscHTML = `<div class="misc-grid">${Object.entries(member.misc || {}).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="misc-item"><div class="misc-label">${k}</div><div class="misc-val">${v}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        let rankClass = 'b-silver';
        if (member.rankLabel === 'Gold') rankClass = 'b-gold';
        else if (member.rankLabel === 'Diamond') rankClass = 'b-diamond';
        else if (member.rankLabel.includes('Diamond')) rankClass = 'b-diamond';
        else if (member.rankLabel === '~Diamond') rankClass = 'b-approx';
        const affil = getAffilClassAndText(member.category || 'Parties');
        const finalHTML = `<div class="dossier">
          <div class="dos-top" id="partyDosTop">
            <div class="dos-avatar" style="background:${member.avBg};color:${member.avColor};border-color:${member.accentColor}">${member.avText}</div>
            <div><div class="dos-name">${member.name}</div><div class="dos-title">${member.title}</div><div class="dos-badges"><span class="badge ${rankClass}">${member.rankLabel} Rank</span><span class="badge b-role">${member.basic.Role || member.role}</span><span class="badge ${affil.cls}">${affil.text}</span></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Basic Information</div>${basicHTML}</div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Statistics</div>${statsHTML}</div>
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Appearance</div><div class="prose"><p>${member.appearance}</p></div></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Personality</div><div class="prose"><p>${member.personality}</p></div></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Background</div><div class="prose"><p>${member.background}</p></div></div>
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Equipment</div>${equipHTML || '<p>None noted.</p>'}</div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Abilities & Magic</div>${abHTML || '<p>None.</p>'}</div>
          ${sigHTML ? `<div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Signature Ability</div>${sigHTML}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Combat Profile</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Strengths</div>${strHTML}</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Weaknesses</div>${wkHTML}</div><div><div class="ab-category">Preferred Strategy</div><div class="prose" style="margin-top:4px"><p>${member.strategy}</p></div></div></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Field Performance</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Best Against</div>${bestHTML}</div><div style="margin-bottom:8px"><div class="ab-category">Struggles Against</div>${struggleHTML}</div><div><div class="ab-category">Notable Feats</div>${featHTML}</div></div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Team Dynamics</div>${teamHTML}${teamRoleHTML}</div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Public Perception</div><div class="rep-box">${member.reputation}</div>${member.nickname ? `<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;color:#666"><strong>Nickname/Title:</strong> ${member.nickname}</div>` : ''}</div>
          <div class="section"><div class="sec-title">Miscellaneous</div>${miscHTML}</div>
        </div>`;
        document.getElementById('partyMemberContent').innerHTML = finalHTML;
        
        const partyDosTop = document.getElementById('partyDosTop');
        if (partyDosTop && !document.querySelector('.print-char-btn')) {
          const printMemberBtn = document.createElement('button');
          printMemberBtn.className = 'power-btn print-char-btn';
          printMemberBtn.textContent = '??? Print This Member';
          printMemberBtn.style.background = '#4a4a6a';
          printMemberBtn.style.marginLeft = '10px';
          printMemberBtn.onclick = () => printCurrentCharacter(member);
          partyDosTop.appendChild(printMemberBtn);
        }
      }
    }

    const tabsContainer = document.getElementById('partyTabs');
    if (tabsContainer) {
      const tabs = tabsContainer.querySelectorAll('.vtab');
      tabs.forEach(tab => {
        tab.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
          tabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
          tab.classList.add('active');
          loadMember(tab.getAttribute('data-id'));
        });
      });
    }
    if (members.length) loadMember(members[0].id);
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      const firstDosTop = document.querySelector('#partyMemberContent .dos-top');
      if (firstDosTop && !document.querySelector('.print-party-btn')) {
        const printPartyBtn = document.createElement('button');
        printPartyBtn.className = 'power-btn print-party-btn';
        printPartyBtn.textContent = '??? Print Entire Party';
        printPartyBtn.style.background = '#4a4a6a';
        printPartyBtn.style.marginLeft = '10px';
        printPartyBtn.onclick = () => printPartyMembers(party);
        firstDosTop.appendChild(printPartyBtn);
      }
    }, 100);
  }

  function buildCategoryList(category) {
    const container = document.getElementById('list');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    currentView = 'list';
    currentCategory = category;

    const backBtn = document.createElement('div');
    backBtn.className = 'entry';
    backBtn.style.borderLeftColor = '#888';
    backBtn.innerHTML = `<div class="av" style="background:#ddd; color:#555">?</div><div><div class="ename">Back to Categories</div><div class="erank">Return to category view</div></div>`;
    backBtn.onclick = () => { currentView = 'categories'; currentCategory = null; renderSidebar(); document.getElementById('detail').innerHTML = '<div class="placeholder">? Select an adventurer or party</div>'; };
    container.appendChild(backBtn);

    const catTitle = document.createElement('div');
    catTitle.className = 'cat-header';
    let titleText = '';
    if (category === 'Parties') titleText = '?? Adventuring Parties';
    else if (category === 'Solo') titleText = '?? Solo Adventurers';
    else if (category === 'Unregistered') titleText = '? Notable Unregistered';
    else if (category === 'Civilian') titleText = '?? Notable Civilians';
    else if (category === 'Faction') titleText = '??? Factions & Organizations';
    catTitle.textContent = titleText;
    container.appendChild(catTitle);

    if (category === 'Parties') {
      parties.forEach(party => {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'entry';
        const firstMember = party.members[0];
        const bg = firstMember?.avBg || '#ddd';
        const color = firstMember?.avColor || '#333';
        const avText = party.members.length > 1 ? '??' : party.members[0]?.avText || 'PT';
        div.innerHTML = `<div class="av" style="background:${bg};color:${color}">${avText}</div><div><div class="ename">${party.name} <span class="party-name">(${party.members.length} members)</span></div><div class="erank">Party</div></div>`;
        div.style.borderLeftColor = firstMember?.accentColor || '#666';
        div.onclick = () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
          div.classList.add('active');
          currentParty = party;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          currentView = 'detail';
          renderPartyDetail(party);
        };
        container.appendChild(div);
      });
    } else if (category === 'Civilian') {
      civilians.forEach(civilian => {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'entry';
        div.innerHTML = `<div class="av" style="background:${civilian.avBg};color:${civilian.avColor}">${civilian.avText}</div><div><div class="ename">${civilian.name}</div><div class="erank">${civilian.role || civilian.sub || 'Civilian'}</div></div>`;
        div.style.borderLeftColor = civilian.accentColor || '#666';
        div.onclick = () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
          div.classList.add('active');
          currentCivilian = civilian;
          currentParty = null;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          currentView = 'detail';
          renderCivilianDetail(civilian);
        };
        container.appendChild(div);
      });
    } else if (category === 'Faction') {
      factions.forEach(faction => {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'entry';
        div.innerHTML = `<div class="av" style="background:${faction.avBg || '#ececec'};color:${faction.avColor || '#555'}">${faction.avText || '???'}</div><div><div class="ename">${faction.name}</div><div class="erank">${faction.sub || 'Organization'}</div></div>`;
        div.style.borderLeftColor = faction.accentColor || '#666';
        div.onclick = () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
          div.classList.add('active');
          currentFaction = faction;
          currentParty = null;
          currentAdventurer = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          currentView = 'detail';
          renderFactionDetail(faction);
        };
        container.appendChild(div);
      });
    } else {
	  const members = allAdventurers.filter(a => a.category === category);
	  members.forEach(adv => {
		const div = document.createElement('div');
		div.className = 'entry';
		
		// Determine rank badge class
		let rankClass = 'rank-approx';
		if (adv.rankLabel === 'Copper') rankClass = 'rank-copper';
		else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Iron') rankClass = 'rank-iron';
		else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Silver') rankClass = 'rank-silver';
		else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Gold') rankClass = 'rank-gold';
		else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Diamond') rankClass = 'rank-diamond';
		else if (adv.rankLabel === 'Mythril') rankClass = 'rank-mythril';
		else if (adv.rankLabel.includes('~')) rankClass = 'rank-approx';
		
		div.innerHTML = `
		  <div class="av" style="background:${adv.avBg};color:${adv.avColor}">${adv.avText}</div>
		  <div>
			<div class="ename">${adv.name} <span class="rank-badge-small ${rankClass}">${adv.rankLabel}</span></div>
			<div class="erank">${adv.basic.Role || adv.role || 'Adventurer'}</div>
		  </div>
		`;
        div.style.borderLeftColor = adv.accentColor || '#666';
        div.onclick = () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
          div.classList.add('active');
          currentAdventurer = adv;
          currentParty = null;
          currentCivilian = null;
          currentFaction = null;
          currentView = 'detail';
          renderAdventurerDetail(adv);
        };
        container.appendChild(div);
      });
    }
  }

  function renderSidebar() {
    const container = document.getElementById('list');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    currentView = 'categories';
    const categories = [
      { key: 'Parties', label: '?? Adventuring Parties', count: parties.length },
      { key: 'Solo', label: '?? Solo Adventurers', count: allAdventurers.filter(a => a.category === 'Solo').length },
      { key: 'Unregistered', label: '? Notable Unregistered', count: allAdventurers.filter(a => a.category === 'Unregistered').length },
      { key: 'Civilian', label: '?? Notable Civilians', count: civilians.length },
      { key: 'Faction', label: '??? Factions & Organizations', count: factions.length }
    ];
    for (const cat of categories) {
      if (cat.count === 0) continue;
      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'cat-header';
      header.textContent = `${cat.label} (${cat.count})`;
      header.onclick = () => buildCategoryList(cat.key);
      container.appendChild(header);
    }
    if (parties.length === 0 && allAdventurers.length === 0 && civilians.length === 0 && factions.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px;color:#999">No data loaded yet.</div>';
    }
  }

  function registerParty(partyId, partyName, membersArray) {
    if (parties.find(p => p.id === partyId)) return;
    parties.push({ id: partyId, name: partyName, members: membersArray });
    renderSidebar();
  }

  function registerAdventurer(adv) {
    if (!adv.id || allAdventurers.find(a => a.id === adv.id)) return;
    allAdventurers.push(adv);
    renderSidebar();
  }

  function registerCivilian(civilian) {
    if (!civilian.id || civilians.find(c => c.id === civilian.id)) return;
    civilians.push(civilian);
    renderSidebar();
  }

  function registerFaction(faction) {
    if (!faction.id || factions.find(f => f.id === faction.id)) return;
    factions.push(faction);
    renderSidebar();
  }

  return { 
    registerParty, 
    registerAdventurer,
    registerCivilian,
    registerFaction,
    printAllCharacters,
    printCurrentCharacter,
    printPartyMembers
  };
})();

// Dark mode toggle + navigation + print all button
(function() {
  const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar');
  const bar = document.createElement('div');
  bar.className = 'category-bar';
  bar.innerHTML = `
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#" class="nav-link" data-page="bestiary">?? Bestiary</a>
      <a href="#" class="nav-link active" data-page="registry">?? Adventurer Registry</a>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center;">
      <button class="theme-toggle" id="registryThemeToggle" title="Toggle dark/light mode" style="font-size: 14px; padding: 4px 4px;">??</button>
      <button class="theme-toggle" id="printAllBtn" title="Print All Characters" style="font-size: 14px; padding: 4px 4px;">???</button>
    </div>
  `;
  sidebar.insertBefore(bar, sidebar.firstChild);
  
  const toggle = document.getElementById('registryThemeToggle');
  const savedDarkMode = localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === 'true';
  if (savedDarkMode) { document.body.classList.add('dark'); toggle.textContent = '??'; }
  else { document.body.classList.remove('dark'); toggle.textContent = '??'; }
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.body.classList.toggle('dark');
    const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('dark');
    localStorage.setItem('darkMode', isDark);
    toggle.textContent = isDark ? '??' : '??';
  });
  
  const printAllBtn = document.getElementById('printAllBtn');
  printAllBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (window.REGISTRY && window.REGISTRY.printAllCharacters) {
      window.REGISTRY.printAllCharacters();
    } else {
      alert('Print function not ready yet. Please wait for data to load.');
    }
  });
  
  const navLinks = bar.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
  navLinks.forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (link.dataset.page === 'bestiary') window.location.href = '../bestiary_almanac/bestiary-core.html';
    });
  });
})();

// Load data
const loadConfig = {
  party: ['blue-constellation', 'the-rhyming-reapers', 'red-wings', 'village-vanguard', 'iron-reckoning'],
  solo: [
	'don-montajes',
	'vincent',
	'delsaran',
	'maxwell-anthor',
	'meg-helsford',
	'kaelen-mori',
	'elias-vance',
	'greg'
  ],
  unregistered: ['izgon', 'sven'],
  civilian: [
	'merrick-blackwood',
	'garrick-stoneheart',
	'lord-valemont',
	'captain-croft',
	'sister-miriam',
	'duke-ashford',
	'master-scholar-loren',
	'thorne-ironside',
	'elara-vance',
	'ronan-blackthorn',
	'serra-ironvein',
	'master-lyn',
	'lucian-vale',
	'alistair-hummingbird'
  ],
  faction: ['aurenveil-council', 'adventurer-guild']
};
const filesToLoad = [];
for (const [folder, names] of Object.entries(loadConfig)) {
  for (const name of names) {
    if (name) filesToLoad.push(`${folder}/${name}-data.js`);
  }
}
let idx = 0;
function loadNext() {
  if (idx >= filesToLoad.length) { console.log('All registry data loaded.'); return; }
  const script = document.createElement('script');
  script.src = filesToLoad[idx];
  script.onload = () => { console.log(`Loaded ${filesToLoad[idx]}`); idx++; loadNext(); };
  script.onerror = () => console.error(`Failed to load ${filesToLoad[idx]}`);
  document.head.appendChild(script);
}
loadNext();
</script>
</body>
</html>

========================================

  if (window.REGISTRY) {
    window.REGISTRY.registerParty('village_vanguard', 'The Village Vanguard', members);
    console.log('The Village Vanguard party loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Registry core not loaded');
  }
})();

In the dungeon he works with the same methodical care he brings to a lecture: cataloguing, assessing, and acting with the minimum force required. He is not ruthless, but he is extremely efficient. He finds younger adventurers endearing in a way he is careful not to make condescending – they remind him of himself, several decades ago, before he learned patience. He cleared dungeons, fought creatures that have since become legends, and accumulated enough wealth that he stopped counting. At some point – accounts vary on exactly when – he found a dungeon that he decided to understand completely rather than just clear. Not defeat it. Understand it. He has spent the last several decades teaching at the noble academy and descending into that same dungeon with his students as a controlled field environment. He knows every corridor, every spawn pattern, every ambient mana fluctuation. The dungeon is, effectively, his classroom with higher stakes. FILE: bestiary_almanac/bestiary-core.html
========================================


<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Bestiary Almanac - Modular</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;font-family:sans-serif}
body{background:#f0f2f5;transition:background 0.2s, color 0.2s; overflow:hidden; height:100vh; padding:8px}
.almanac{display:flex;height:calc(100vh - 16px);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;border:1px solid #ccc}
.sidebar{width:240px;min-width:240px;background:#f5f5f5;border-right:1px solid #ddd;display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;overflow:hidden}

<body>
<div class="almanac">
  <div class="sidebar">
	  <div class="sidebar-title">Bestiary Almanac</div>
	  <div id="list" class="entry-list"></div>
	</div>
  <div class="detail" id="detail">
    <div class="placeholder">? Select a category, then a creature</div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ========================
// BESTIARY CORE MODULE (with Threat Assessment Button & Threat Sort)
// ========================
window.BESTIARY = (function() {
  let categories = {};
  let categoryGroups = {};
  let categoryIcons = {};
  let currentView = 'categories';
  let currentGroup = null;
  let currentCategory = null;
  let currentEntry = null;
  let currentVariantKey = 'base';
  let currentSort = 'default';
  
  // Threat cache for sorting
  const threatCache = new Map();
  
  const GROUPS = {
    'Species': { key: 'Species', label: '?? Creature Species', order: 1 },
    'Biomes':  { key: 'Biomes',  label: '?? Biome & Habitat', order: 2 },
    'Special': { key: 'Special', label: '? Legendary & Mythical', order: 3 }
  };
  
  const DEFAULT_CAPS = { F:100, E:250, D:500, C:1000, B:2500, A:6000, S:15000, SS:40000, SSS:100000 };
  const RANK_META = {
    F:{label:'F',bg:'#e8f5e9',tc:'#2e7d32'}, E:{label:'E',bg:'#e3f2fd',tc:'#1565c0'},
    D:{label:'D',bg:'#ede7f6',tc:'#4527a0'}, C:{label:'C',bg:'#fff8e1',tc:'#e65100'},
    B:{label:'B',bg:'#fce4ec',tc:'#880e4f'}, A:{label:'A',bg:'#fbe9e7',tc:'#bf360c'},
    S:{label:'S',bg:'#f3e5f5',tc:'#4a148c'}, SS:{label:'SS',bg:'#1a237e',tc:'#e8eaf6'},
    SSS:{label:'SSS',bg:'#212121',tc:'#f5f5f5'}, UNKNOWN:{label:'? Unknown',bg:'#263238',tc:'#eceff1'}
  };
  const INTEL_TIERS = [
    {max:50, label:'Instinctive', bc:'#bdbdbd'}, {max:200, label:'Reactive', bc:'#81c784'},
    {max:500, label:'Aware', bc:'#90caf9'}, {max:900, label:'Strategic', bc:'#ce93d8'},
    {max:9999, label:'Sentient', bc:'#424242'}
  ];
  
  function fmt(n) { return n>=1000 ? n.toLocaleString() : String(n); }
  function capFor(r) { return DEFAULT_CAPS[r] || 100; }
  function pct(v, cap) { return Math.min(100, Math.round(v/cap*100)); }
  function intelTier(v) { for(let t of INTEL_TIERS) if(v<=t.max) return t; return INTEL_TIERS[INTEL_TIERS.length-1]; }
  
  function getTagClass(tag) {
    const map = {
      'Passive':'mp-passive','Aggressive':'mp-aggressive','Territorial':'mp-territorial','Neutral':'mp-neutral',
      'Swarm':'mp-swarm','Ambush':'mp-ambush','Siege':'mp-siege','Control':'mp-control','Burst':'mp-burst',
      'Evasive':'mp-evasive','Instinctive':'mp-instinctive','Reactive':'mp-reactive','Aware':'mp-aware',
      'Strategic':'mp-strategic','Sentient':'mp-sentient','Environmental':'mp-environmental','Symbiotic':'mp-symbiotic',
      'Predatory':'mp-predatory','Defensive':'mp-defensive'
    };
    return map[tag] || 'mp-neutral';
  }
  
  function getThreatValue(entry) {
    if (threatCache.has(entry.id)) {
      return threatCache.get(entry.id);
    }
    let threat = 0;
    if (window.THREAT_EVALUATION && window.THREAT_EVALUATION.isCreature(entry)) {
      const result = window.THREAT_EVALUATION.evaluateThreat(entry, { count: 1 });
      threat = result.effectiveThreat;
    } else {
      const rankOrder = ['F', 'E', 'D', 'C', 'B', 'A', 'S', 'SS', 'SSS'];
      threat = rankOrder.indexOf(entry.rank) + 1;
    }
    threatCache.set(entry.id, threat);
    return threat;
  }
  
  function getHostilityValue(tags) {
    if (!tags || !tags.behavior) return 2;
    if (tags.behavior.includes('Passive')) return 0;
    if (tags.behavior.includes('Neutral')) return 1;
    if (tags.behavior.includes('Aggressive') || tags.behavior.includes('Territorial') || tags.behavior.includes('Berserker')) return 3;
    return 2;
  }

  function getRankValue(rank) {
    const rankOrder = ['F', 'E', 'D', 'C', 'B', 'A', 'S', 'SS', 'SSS', 'UNKNOWN'];
    const idx = rankOrder.indexOf(rank);
    return idx === -1 ? 999 : idx;
  }
  
  function getVariantData(entry, varKey) {
    if(varKey === 'base') {
      return {
        rank: entry.rank, ibg: entry.ibg, icon: entry.icon, sub: entry.sub, size: entry.size,
        biomes: entry.biomes, intel: entry.intel, tags: entry.tags, desc: entry.desc,
        stats: entry.stats, bars: entry.bars, weak: entry.weak, res: entry.res, ab: entry.ab,
        loot: entry.loot || [], lootNote: entry.lootNote || null, warn: null, territory: null, territorialSS: false
      };
    }
    let variant = (entry.variants || []).find(v => v.key === varKey);
    if(!variant) return null;
    return {
      rank: variant.rank, ibg: variant.ibg, icon: variant.icon, sub: variant.sub, size: variant.size || 'Unknown',
      biomes: variant.biomes || entry.biomes, intel: variant.intel || entry.intel, tags: variant.tags || entry.tags,
      desc: variant.desc, stats: variant.stats, bars: variant.bars, weak: variant.weak, res: variant.res, ab: variant.ab,
      loot: variant.loot || [], lootNote: variant.lootNote || null, warn: variant.warn || null,
      territory: variant.territory || null, territorialSS: variant.territorialSS || false
    };
  }
  
  function sortEntries(entries, sortType) {
    const sorted = [...entries];
    switch(sortType) {
      case 'name':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        break;
      case 'hostility':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => {
          const aVal = getHostilityValue(a.tags);
          const bVal = getHostilityValue(b.tags);
          if (aVal !== bVal) return aVal - bVal;
          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        });
        break;
      case 'rank':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => {
          const aVal = getRankValue(a.rank);
          const bVal = getRankValue(b.rank);
          if (aVal !== bVal) return aVal - bVal;
          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        });
        break;
      case 'threat':
        sorted.sort((a, b) => {
          const aThreat = getThreatValue(a);
          const bThreat = getThreatValue(b);
          if (aThreat !== bThreat) return aThreat - bThreat;
          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        });
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
    return sorted;
  }
  
  function renderDetail(entry, varKey) {
    let panel = document.getElementById('detail');
    let tabs = [{key:'base', label:'?? Base'}];
    if(entry.variants) entry.variants.forEach(v => tabs.push({key:v.key, label:v.label}));
    let tabsHTML = tabs.map(t => `<div class="vtab ${t.key===varKey ? 'active' : ''}" data-key="${t.key}">${t.label}</div>`).join('');
    let vd = getVariantData(entry, varKey);
    if(!vd) { panel.innerHTML = '<div class="placeholder">Error loading variant</div>'; return; }
    let rm = RANK_META[vd.rank] || RANK_META.F;
    let cap = capFor(vd.rank);
    let it = intelTier(vd.intel);
    
    let allTags = [];
    if(vd.tags) {
      ['behavior','combat','intelligence','interaction'].forEach(cat => {
        (vd.tags[cat] || []).forEach(t => allTags.push(t));
      });
    }
    let tagsHTML = allTags.map(t => `<span class="meta-pill ${getTagClass(t)}">${t}</span>`).join('');
    
    let statsHTML = Object.keys(vd.stats).map(k => {
      let v = vd.stats[k];
      let col = vd.bars[k] || '#999';
      return `<div class="srow"><span class="slbl">${k}</span>
        <div class="bline"><div class="btrack"><div class="bfill" style="width:${pct(v, cap)}%;background:${col}"></div></div>
        <span class="sval">${fmt(v)}</span></div></div>`;
    }).join('');
    
    let biomeHTML = (vd.biomes || []).map(b => `<span class="biome-pill">${b}</span>`).join('');
    let weakHTML = (vd.weak || []).map(w => `<span class="pill w">${w}</span>`).join('');
    let resHTML = (vd.res || []).map(r => `<span class="pill r">${r}</span>`).join('');
    let abHTML = (vd.ab || []).map(a => `<span class="pill a">${a}</span>`).join('');
    
    let lootHTML = '';
    if(vd.lootNote) lootHTML = `<div class="loot-box"><div class="loot-title">? Loot & Materials</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-style:italic">${vd.lootNote}</div></div>`;
    else if(vd.loot && vd.loot.length) {
      lootHTML = `<div class="loot-box"><div class="loot-title">? Loot & Materials</div>${vd.loot.map(l => `<div class="loot-item"><span class="loot-rarity lr-${l.rarity}">${l.rarity}</span><span><strong>${l.name}</strong> — ${l.note}</span></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
    }
    let warnHTML = vd.warn ? `<div class="warn-box"><div class="warn-title">? Guild Advisory</div>${vd.warn}</div>` : '';
    let terrHTML = vd.territory ? `<div class="terr-box"><div class="terr-title">?? Territorial SS Scaling</div>${vd.territory}</div>` : '';
    let terrBadge = vd.territorialSS ? `<span class="terr-badge">SS within territory</span>` : '';
    
    panel.innerHTML = `<div class="variant-tabs">${tabsHTML}</div>
      <div class="vcontent">
        <span class="rank-badge" style="background:${rm.bg};color:${rm.tc}">${rm.label} Rank</span>${terrBadge}
        <div class="creature-head"><div class="cicon" style="background:${vd.ibg}">${vd.icon}</div><div><div class="cname">${entry.name}</div><div class="csub">${vd.sub}</div></div></div>
        <div class="meta-row">${tagsHTML}</div>
        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Size</div><div class="info-val">${vd.size}</div></div>
          <div class="info-item"><div class="info-label">Intelligence</div>
            <div class="intel-bar-wrap"><div class="intel-track"><div class="intel-fill" style="width:${Math.min(100, Math.round(vd.intel/10))}%;background:${it.bc}"></div></div><span class="intel-val" style="color:${it.bc}">${vd.intel}</span></div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:${it.bc};font-weight:700">${it.label}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="slabel">Biome</div><div class="biome-pills" style="margin-bottom:8px">${biomeHTML}</div>
        <div class="desc">${vd.desc}</div>
        <div class="cap-note">Stat ceiling for ${rm.label} rank: ${fmt(cap)}${vd.territorialSS ? ` · SS territory ceiling: ${fmt(DEFAULT_CAPS.SS)}` : ''}</div>
        <div class="stats-grid">${statsHTML}</div>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <div class="slabel">Weaknesses</div><div class="pills">${weakHTML}</div>
        <div class="slabel">Resistances</div><div class="pills">${resHTML}</div>
        <div class="slabel">Abilities</div><div class="pills">${abHTML}</div>
        ${lootHTML}${warnHTML}${terrHTML}
      </div>`;
    
    // Add Threat Assessment button
    const contentDiv = panel.querySelector('.vcontent');
    if (contentDiv && window.THREAT_EVALUATION) {
      const existingPanel = contentDiv.querySelector('.threat-panel');
      if (existingPanel) existingPanel.remove();
      const existingBtn = contentDiv.querySelector('.threat-btn');
      if (existingBtn) existingBtn.remove();
      
      const threatBtn = document.createElement('button');
      threatBtn.className = 'threat-btn';
      threatBtn.textContent = '? Assess Threat';
      threatBtn.style.margin = '5px 0 10px 0';
      const creatureToAssess = vd;
      
      threatBtn.onclick = () => {
        const existing = contentDiv.querySelector('.threat-panel');
        if (existing) existing.remove();
        const result = window.THREAT_EVALUATION.evaluateThreat(creatureToAssess, { count: 1, coordinated: false });
        let ratingClass = '';
        if (result.rating === 'Extreme') ratingClass = 'rating-critical';
        else if (result.rating === 'High') ratingClass = 'rating-high';
        else if (result.rating === 'Moderate') ratingClass = 'rating-moderate';
        else if (result.rating === 'Low') ratingClass = 'rating-low';
        const panelHTML = document.createElement('div');
        panelHTML.className = 'threat-panel';
        panelHTML.innerHTML = `
          <h4>? Guild Threat Assessment</h4>
          <div><strong>Target:</strong> ${creatureToAssess.name || entry.name} (${creatureToAssess.sub || 'Base'})</div>
          <div><strong>Base Threat:</strong> ${result.baseThreatValue.toFixed(2)}/25</div>
          <div><strong>Effective Threat:</strong> <span class="${ratingClass}">${result.effectiveThreat.toFixed(2)}</span> (${result.rating})</div>
          <div><strong>Recommended Rank:</strong> ${result.recommendedRank}</div>
          <div><strong>Factors:</strong> ${result.factors.count > 1 ? `Count: ${result.factors.count}, ` : ''}${result.factors.coordinated ? 'Coordinated, ' : ''}${result.factors.nativeBiome ? 'Native biome, ' : ''}${result.factors.hasHorde ? 'Horde behavior' : ''}</div>
          ${result.note ? `<div style="color:#aaa; font-style:italic; margin-top:5px">${result.note}</div>` : ''}
        `;
        const statsGrid = contentDiv.querySelector('.stats-grid');
        if (statsGrid) statsGrid.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', panelHTML);
        else contentDiv.appendChild(panelHTML);
      };
      
      const capNote = contentDiv.querySelector('.cap-note');
      if (capNote) capNote.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', threatBtn);
      else contentDiv.insertBefore(threatBtn, contentDiv.firstChild);
    }
    
    panel.querySelectorAll('.vtab').forEach(tab => {
      tab.onclick = () => { currentVariantKey = tab.dataset.key; renderDetail(entry, currentVariantKey); };
    });
  }
  
  function buildCategoryList(groupKey) {
    const container = document.getElementById('list');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    currentView = 'list';
    currentGroup = groupKey;
    
    const backBtn = document.createElement('div');
    backBtn.className = 'entry';
    backBtn.style.borderLeftColor = '#888';
    backBtn.innerHTML = `<div class="eicon" style="background:#ddd">?</div><div><div class="ename">Back to Categories</div><div class="erank">Return to group view</div></div>`;
    backBtn.onclick = () => { currentView = 'categories'; currentGroup = null; renderSidebar(); document.getElementById('detail').innerHTML = '<div class="placeholder">? Select a category, then a creature</div>'; };
    container.appendChild(backBtn);
    
    const groupLabel = GROUPS[groupKey]?.label || groupKey;
    const groupTitle = document.createElement('div');
    groupTitle.className = 'cat-header';
    groupTitle.textContent = groupLabel;
    container.appendChild(groupTitle);
    
    const categoriesInGroup = [];
    for (const [catName] of Object.entries(categories)) {
      if (categoryGroups[catName] === groupKey) {
        categoriesInGroup.push({ name: catName, count: categories[catName].length, icon: categoryIcons[catName] || '??' });
      }
    }
    
    categoriesInGroup.forEach(cat => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'entry';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="eicon" style="background:#e8e8e8">${cat.icon}</div><div><div class="ename">${cat.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + cat.name.slice(1)}</div><div class="erank">${cat.count} entries</div></div>`;
      div.onclick = () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
        div.classList.add('active');
        currentCategory = cat.name;
        currentEntry = null;
        buildCreatureList();
      };
      container.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  
  function buildCreatureList() {
    const container = document.getElementById('list');
    if (!currentCategory || !categories[currentCategory]) {
      renderSidebar();
      return;
    }
    const entries = sortEntries(categories[currentCategory], currentSort);
    container.innerHTML = '';
    currentView = 'list';
    
    const backBtn = document.createElement('div');
    backBtn.className = 'entry';
    backBtn.style.borderLeftColor = '#888';
    backBtn.innerHTML = `<div class="eicon" style="background:#ddd">?</div><div><div class="ename">Back to ${GROUPS[categoryGroups[currentCategory]]?.label || 'Categories'}</div><div class="erank">Return to category list</div></div>`;
    backBtn.onclick = () => { buildCategoryList(categoryGroups[currentCategory]); };
    container.appendChild(backBtn);
    
    const catTitle = document.createElement('div');
    catTitle.className = 'cat-header';
    catTitle.textContent = currentCategory.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + currentCategory.slice(1);
    container.appendChild(catTitle);
    
    const sortBar = document.createElement('div');
    sortBar.className = 'sorting-bar';
    sortBar.innerHTML = `
      <span class="sort-label">Sort by:</span>
      <select class="sort-select" id="sortSelect">
        <option value="default" ${currentSort === 'default' ? 'selected' : ''}>Default</option>
        <option value="name" ${currentSort === 'name' ? 'selected' : ''}>Name (A-Z)</option>
        <option value="hostility" ${currentSort === 'hostility' ? 'selected' : ''}>Hostility (Passive ? Aggressive)</option>
        <option value="rank" ${currentSort === 'rank' ? 'selected' : ''}>Rank (F ? SSS)</option>
        <option value="threat" ${currentSort === 'threat' ? 'selected' : ''}>? Evaluated Threat (Low ? High)</option>
      </select>
    `;
    container.appendChild(sortBar);
    
    const sortSelect = sortBar.querySelector('#sortSelect');
    sortSelect.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
      currentSort = e.target.value;
      buildCreatureList();
    });
    
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      const rm = RANK_META[entry.rank] || RANK_META.F;
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'entry';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="eicon" style="background:${entry.ibg}">${entry.icon}</div><div><div class="ename">${entry.name}</div><div class="erank">${rm.label} Rank</div></div>`;
      div.onclick = () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
        div.classList.add('active');
        currentEntry = entry;
        currentVariantKey = 'base';
        renderDetail(entry, 'base');
      };
      container.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  
  function renderSidebar() {
    const container = document.getElementById('list');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    currentView = 'categories';
    
    const grouped = {};
    for (const [catName] of Object.entries(categories)) {
      const groupKey = categoryGroups[catName];
      if (!groupKey) continue;
      if (!grouped[groupKey]) grouped[groupKey] = [];
      grouped[groupKey].push(catName);
    }
    
    const sortedGroups = Object.values(GROUPS).sort((a,b) => a.order - b.order);
    for (const group of sortedGroups) {
      const cats = grouped[group.key];
      if (!cats || cats.length === 0) continue;
      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'cat-header';
      header.textContent = `${group.label} (${cats.length} categories)`;
      header.onclick = () => buildCategoryList(group.key);
      container.appendChild(header);
    }
    
    if (Object.keys(categories).length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px;color:#999">No categories loaded yet.</div>';
    }
  }
  
  function registerCategory(categoryName, entries, groupName = 'Other', icon = '??') {
    if (!categories[categoryName]) categories[categoryName] = [];
    categories[categoryName].push(...entries);
    categoryGroups[categoryName] = groupName;
    categoryIcons[categoryName] = icon;
    if (currentView === 'categories') renderSidebar();
  }
  
  function initUI() {
    const almanacDiv = document.querySelector('.almanac');
    const sidebar = almanacDiv.querySelector('.sidebar');
    const categoryBar = document.createElement('div');
    categoryBar.className = 'category-bar';
    categoryBar.innerHTML = `<div class="nav-links"><a href="#" class="nav-link active" data-page="bestiary">?? Bestiary</a><a href="#" class="nav-link" data-page="registry">?? Adventurer Registry</a></div><button class="theme-toggle" id="themeToggle" title="Toggle dark/light mode">??</button>`;
    sidebar.insertBefore(categoryBar, sidebar.firstChild);
    
    const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
    const savedDarkMode = localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === 'true';
    if (savedDarkMode) { document.body.classList.add('dark'); themeToggle.textContent = '??'; }
    else { document.body.classList.remove('dark'); themeToggle.textContent = '??'; }
    themeToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.body.classList.toggle('dark');
      const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('dark');
      localStorage.setItem('darkMode', isDark);
      themeToggle.textContent = isDark ? '??' : '??';
    });
    
    const navLinks = categoryBar.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
    navLinks.forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (link.dataset.page === 'registry') window.location.href = '../adventurer_registry/registry-core.html';
      });
    });
  }
  
  return { registerCategory, initUI };
})();

// Initialize UI and load data
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  BESTIARY.initUI();
  
  const systemScripts = ['../systems/rank-system.js', '../systems/power-scaling.js', '../systems/threat-evaluation.js'];
  let sysIdx = 0;
  function loadSystem() {
    if (sysIdx >= systemScripts.length) { loadData(); return; }
    const s = document.createElement('script');
    s.src = systemScripts[sysIdx];
    s.onload = () => { sysIdx++; loadSystem(); };
    s.onerror = () => console.error(`Failed to load ${systemScripts[sysIdx]}`);
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  }
  
  function loadData() {
    const loadConfig = {
      species: ['slime', 'goblin', 'orc', 'spider', 'fey', 'giant', 'demihuman', 'undead', 'elemental', 'demon', 'dragonkind'],
      biomes: ['plains', 'forest', 'desert', 'ocean', 'mountain', 'arctic', 'swamp', 'cave', 'jungle', 'volcanic', 'dungeon', 'urban'],
      special: ['mythical']
    };
    const filesToLoad = [];
    for (const [folder, names] of Object.entries(loadConfig)) {
      for (const name of names) filesToLoad.push(`${folder}/${name}-data.js`);
    }
    let idx = 0;
    function loadNext() {
      if (idx >= filesToLoad.length) { console.log('All bestiary data loaded.'); return; }
      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = filesToLoad[idx];
      script.onload = () => { console.log(`Loaded ${filesToLoad[idx]}`); idx++; loadNext(); };
      script.onerror = () => console.error(`Failed to load ${filesToLoad[idx]}`);
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    }
    loadNext();
  }
  
  loadSystem();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>


========================================
FILE: bestiary_almanac/species/slime-data.js
========================================

  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('orcs', entries, 'Species', '??');

    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded. Make sure bestiary-core.html is loaded first.');

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('spiders', entries, 'Species', '???');
    console.log('Spider data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded.');
  }
})();

    res: ['All physical','All magic','Fear','Death'],
    ab: ['Reality shift (rewrites local terrain, spawns creatures, alters physics)', 'Domain control (within Feywild, archfey is effectively invincible)', 'Immortal (cannot be permanently killed outside specific conditions)'],
    warn: 'Do not engage. Archfey are not enemies; they are forces of nature with a sense of humor. Bargain, do not fight.',
    loot: [{ name:'Archfey Boon (theoretical)', rarity:'unique', note:'If an archfey favors you, they may grant a wish – without twisting it. Rare.' }]
  };
  entries.push(archfey);

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('fey', entries, 'Species', '??');
    console.log('Fey data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded. Make sure bestiary-core.html is loaded first.');
  }
})();

========================================
FILE: bestiary_almanac/species/demon-data.js
========================================


// demon-data.js (fully expanded with variants, evolution, conditional loot, living loot, hybrid undead)
(function() {
  const entries = [];

  // ========================
  // LESSER DEMONS (C–B Rank)
  // ========================

  // Imp

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('plains', entries, 'Biomes', '??');
    console.log('Plains data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded.');
  }
})();

FILE: bestiary_almanac/biomes/desert-data.js

========================================
FILE: bestiary_almanac/biomes/ocean-data.js
========================================

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('mountain', entries, 'Biomes', '???');
    console.log('Mountain data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded.');
  }
})();

    weak: ['Divine fire', 'World flame (theoretical)', 'Sealing'],
    res: ['All physical', 'All elemental (except divine fire)', 'Cold', 'Ice'],
    ab: ['Permafrost (freezes entire region, 500 dmg/sec to all non-arctic creatures)', 'Glacial shift (moves glaciers, reshapes landscape, buries enemies)', 'Winter\'s wrath (summons eternal winter, reduces global temperature)'],
    warn: 'Ymir is not a combat encounter. It is a world event. Do not wake it.',
    loot: [{ name:'Ymir\'s Tear', rarity:'unique', note:'A frozen crystal that can create a new glacier' }]
  };
  entries.push(ymir);

  // ========================
  // NAMED LOCATION: THE FROZEN DEEP (Anomaly)
  // ========================
  const frozenDeep = {
    id: 'frozen_deep',
    name: 'The Frozen Deep',
    sub: 'Anomaly · Caved Glacier',
    rank: 'SS (estimated)',
    ibg: '#b0d0e8',
    icon: '??',
    size: 'Unknown, beneath the largest glacier',
    biomes: ['Frozen Deep', 'Glacial Cave', 'Heart of Ice'],
    intel: 0,
    tags: { behavior: ['Passive', 'Territorial'], combat: ['Environmental'], intelligence: ['Unknown'], interaction: ['Environmental'] },
    desc: 'The Frozen Deep is a massive cave system beneath the largest glacier. It is so cold that even fire magic barely functions. Legend says Ymir sleeps at its heart. Few have entered; fewer have returned. The ice itself seems alive, shifting to confuse and trap explorers.',
    stats: {
      'Estimated Depth': 'Unknown',
      'Minimum Entry Rank': 'Diamond (with magical cold protection)',
      'Spawn Pattern': 'Frozen undead, ice elementals',
      'Risk Level': 'Extreme – do not enter alone',
      'Corruption Level': 'Time distortion reported'
    },
    bars: { 'Estimated Depth':'#ffa000', 'Minimum Entry Rank':'#d32f2f', 'Spawn Pattern':'#00bcd4', 'Risk Level':'#800080', 'Corruption Level':'#e91e63' },
    weak: ['Divine fire', 'Sealing'],
    res: ['Physical traversal'],
    ab: [
      'Extreme cold (100 dmg/sec without magical cold protection)',
      'Shifting ice (maps become useless, corridors change)',
      'Frozen undead (inhabitants are ancient, powerful)',
      'Ymir\'s presence (if awakened, global apocalypse)'
    ],
    warn: 'The Frozen Deep is not a dungeon to be cleared. It is a place to be respected. Do not enter without a party of Diamond-rank adventurers and divine cold protection.',
    loot: [{ name:'Frozen Deep Crystal', rarity:'unique', note:'Found only in the deepest caves – used in legendary ice weapons' }]
  };
  entries.push(frozenDeep);

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('arctic', entries, 'Biomes', '??');
    console.log('Arctic data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded.');
  }
})();

    warn: 'The Black Lagoon Creature is a legend. Few have seen it and lived. Do not go near the lagoon at night.',
    loot: [{ name:'Ancient Scale', rarity:'unique', note:'Primordial – used in legendary artifacts' }, { name:'Primal Heart', rarity:'unique', note:'Beats with primeval energy' }]
  };
  entries.push(blackLagoon);

  // ========================
  // NAMED LOCATION: THE SINKING MIRE (Anomaly)
  // ========================
  const sinkingMire = {
    id: 'sinking_mire',
    name: 'The Sinking Mire',
    sub: 'Anomaly · Living Bog',
    rank: 'SS (estimated)',
    ibg: '#6e8e6e',
    icon: '??',
    size: 'Unknown, bog that swallows travelers',
    biomes: ['Sinking Mire', 'Deep Bog', 'Lost Swamp'],
    intel: 0,
    tags: { behavior: ['Territorial', 'Inscrutable'], combat: ['Environmental'], intelligence: ['Unknown'], interaction: ['Environmental'] },
    desc: 'The Sinking Mire is a vast, seemingly alive bog that swallows travelers. Paths shift, the ground gives way, and strange lights lead wanderers deeper. It is not malevolent, but it is hungry. Few enter; fewer leave.',
    stats: {
      'Estimated Area': 'Hundreds of sq km',
      'Minimum Entry Rank': 'Gold (with guide)',
      'Spawn Pattern': 'Bog hags, will-o\'-wisps, swamp wyrms',
      'Risk Level': 'High – do not go alone',
      'Corruption Level': 'Moderate (time distortion reported)'
    },
    bars: { 'Estimated Area':'#ffa000', 'Minimum Entry Rank':'#d32f2f', 'Spawn Pattern':'#00bcd4', 'Risk Level':'#800080', 'Corruption Level':'#e91e63' },
    weak: ['Drainage', 'Sealing'],
    res: ['Physical traversal'],
    ab: [
      'Shifting paths (maps become useless, the bog changes layout)',
      'Swallowing ground (quicksand, 50 dmg/sec, drowning)',
      'Mist (reduces visibility to 10 m, causes disorientation)',
      'Manifest creatures (the bog can spawn any swamp creature at will)'
    ],
    warn: 'The Sinking Mire is not a dungeon. It is a location. Do not treat it as a combat encounter. Respect it, or it will swallow you.',
    loot: [{ name:'Mire Crystal', rarity:'rare', note:'Found only in the deep bog – used in earth magic' }]
  };
  entries.push(sinkingMire);

  // ========================
  // REGISTER CATEGORY
  // ========================
  if (window.BESTIARY) {
    window.BESTIARY.registerCategory('swamp', entries, 'Biomes', '??');
    console.log('Swamp data (complete ecosystem) loaded successfully.');
  } else {
    console.error('Bestiary core not loaded.');
  }
})();

    loot: [{ name:'Monarch Core', rarity:'unique', note:'Pure mana crystal – can power a city for a century' }, { name:'Crystal Crown', rarity:'unique', note:'Shard from its head – legendary regalia' }]
  };
  entries.push(crystalMonarch);

  // ========================
  // NAMED CAVE: THE CRYSTAL NEXUS (Location)
  // ========================
  const crystalNexus = {
    id: 'crystal_nexus',
    name: 'The Crystal Nexus',
    sub: 'Mana Convergence · Living Cave',
    rank: 'SS (location)',
    ibg: '#d0e8f0',
    icon: '??',
    size: 'Massive cavern, walls covered in crystals',
    biomes: ['Crystal Cave', 'Deep Cavern', 'Mana Nexus'],
